ogTitle: Little Jilliby vs Little Plain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Little Jilliby and Little Plain.
heading: Little Jilliby vs Little Plain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Little Jilliby, New South Wales and Little Plain, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Little Jilliby has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Little Plain (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Little Jilliby or Little Plain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Little Jilliby has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Little Plain scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Little Jilliby scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Little Plain scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Little Jilliby or Little Plain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Little Jilliby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
